creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just tried this in 15-CURRENT with iwlwifi. Upon boot ifconfig shows the interface without up or down in it's flags.

`service netif start wlan0` works to connect to the network specified in wpa_supplicant, but it did spazz out with iwlwifi errors for about a minute first.

Alternatively, issuing `ifconfig wlan0 up` makes it connect to the unsecured honeypot in this cafe.
